_comment: mcphost servers.json example. Used with mcphost (https://github.com/mark3labs/mcphost), the Go-based MCP host that bridges between Ollama and MCP servers. Save to ~/.config/mcphost/servers.json. Run with: mcphost -m ollama:llama4:70b --config ~/.config/mcphost/servers.json. Requires Ollama running locally on port 11434 and a 70B model pulled. Replace REPLACE_WITH_* values.
